tagline: Broken Spring at Midnight? Aurora's Got One Number to Call.
hero_subtitle: Expert garage door repair, installation, and maintenance serving Aurora, IL and the entire Fox Valley region. 24/7 emergency service, transparent pricing, and a 4.9-star reputation built on 950+ reviews.
service_area_description: Serving Aurora, North Aurora, Batavia, Geneva, Naperville, Oswego, Plainfield, and surrounding Kane and DuPage County communities.
seo_title: Fox Valley Garage Door Solutions | 24/7 Garage Door Repair in Aurora, IL
seo_description: Fox Valley Garage Door Solutions — 24/7 garage door repair, installation, and maintenance in Aurora, IL. Licensed technicians, transparent pricing. 4.9-star rated with 950+ reviews.
services_subtitle: From broken springs to full installations — fast, reliable garage door service when you need it most.
reviews_subtitle: Fox Valley homeowners trust us to keep their garage doors running safely — day and night.
cta_heading: Garage door stuck or making noise?
cta_subtitle: Call us 24/7 or book a free inspection. We'll diagnose it fast and give you an honest quote.
footer_description: Expert garage door repair, installation, and maintenance serving Aurora and the Fox Valley. 24/7 emergency service. Licensed and insured.

services_featured.name: Garage Door Repair
services_featured.description: Broken springs, snapped cables, off-track doors, dented panels — our technicians diagnose and fix it fast, often same-day. Available 24/7 for emergencies.

services_secondary.name: Garage Door Installation
services_secondary.description: New construction or replacement — we carry top brands like Clopay, Amarr, and Wayne Dalton. Expert fitting and a perfect finish, every time.

services_accent.name: Garage Door Opener Service
services_accent.description: LiftMaster, Genie, and Chamberlain opener installation, repair, and programming. Smart-home compatible openers available.

services_wide.name: Preventive Maintenance
services_wide.description: Annual tune-ups that catch small problems before they become expensive repairs. Lubrication, balance testing, safety checks, and hardware tightening.

about_features.title: Licensed & Experienced Technicians
about_features.description: Every technician is fully trained in the latest safety protocols and carries 10+ years of hands-on garage door experience.

about_features.title: 24/7 Emergency Response
about_features.description: Garage door emergencies don't wait — neither do we. Call anytime for fast, reliable service day or night.

about_features.title: Transparent, Honest Pricing
about_features.description: Clear estimates before we start. No hidden fees, no surprise charges. Just fair pricing for quality work.

reviews.name: Sarah T.
reviews.text: They fixed my garage door the same day I called! The technician was friendly, professional, and explained everything clearly. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Mike P.
reviews.text: New garage door installation was seamless. The team helped us choose a design that matched our home perfectly. Fantastic service from start to finish.

reviews.name: Linda R.
reviews.text: Affordable maintenance service that caught small issues before they became big problems. These guys really know what they're doing.
